stemHtml: With regard to decompression sickness associated with flight, it is known that..

options.a: age, obesity, and SCUBA diving are risk factors.
options.b: SCUBA diving does not pose any problem for a subsequent flight.
options.c: physical activity after decompression reduces the risks of decompression sickness symptoms.
options.d: gender is the prime risk factor, with two out of every three women being sensitive to it.
